description: Composition Blue, black and white check shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar with a full front button placket, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a mid-arm button, pocket on the left chest and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with warm water Do not bleach Tumble dry Warm iron denizen's new range of casual shirts inject an effortlessly stylish aesthetic into your off-duty wardrobe with their classic cuts and vintage themed prints. The long sleeves can be rolled up for winter, making this a versatile add to an off-duty ensemble. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
